# utils.expand_endpoints { #unifres.utils.expand_endpoints }

```python
utils.expand_endpoints(endpoints, resolution=101)
```

Expand endpoint pairs into a series of points for plotting.

This is an internal convenience function used for creating density plots.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type       | Description                                                                     | Default    |
|------------|------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| endpoints  | np.ndarray | An (n x 2) array of [lower, upper] endpoints.                                   | _required_ |
| resolution | int        | The number of points to interpolate between each endpoint pair, by default 101. | `101`      |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type       | Description                                      |
|--------|------------|--------------------------------------------------|
|        | np.ndarray | A flattened 1D array of the interpolated points. |
